identity.name: E1
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix disparate disciplines.
Emotion First: Every decision maps to a feeling.
Content is King: Direct the user's attention.
Zoom In: Focus on essential details.
Contrast: Light vs Dark, Rough vs Smooth.
anti_patterns: Purple/Teal for CTA (Use Indigo/Violet or Monochrome)

body.usage: Body text, UI labels, Buttons, Inputs

mono.usage: Code blocks, IDs, API Keys, JSON Viewer

rules: Headings (Size > 32px): MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines / Labels: Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Line Height: Tight (leading-none) for headers, Loose (leading-relaxed) for body.
Contrast: Text must meet APCA standards. Muted text should not be too faint.
Primary color (Indigo) used sparingly for CTAs and active states.
No full-screen gradients. Use texture or solid colors.

strategies: Sidebar Navigation (Left fixed) for App Layout.
Top Header for Breadcrumbs, User Profile, Theme Toggle.
Dashboard: Grid layout with varied span sizes (1x1, 2x1, 2x2).

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-lg border border-border shadow-sm

inputs.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: Use on active cards or featured workflows.
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Hover states on all interactive elements. Tooltips for icons.

login.layout: Split Screen (Left: Form, Right: 3D Abstract Image)

elements: Workflow Card (Name, Status, Last Run, Trigger Button)

workflow_detail.layout: Two Column (Left: Trigger Form, Right: Results/History)

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use generic AI slop design.
DO NOT use gradients on text.
Use data-testid for all interactive elements.
Dark mode is the default and primary theme.
instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the file structure of a standard React + FastAPI app.
Use Shadcn UI components but customize the styling via Tailwind classes to match the 'E1' persona.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' layout for dashboards.
Ensure all API calls are handled gracefully with loading states and error messages.
